boxDescription: The instrument panel fuse box is located on the lower side of the driver's side instrument panel. To access the fuses, remove the storage compartment. To remove the storage compartment, open it and pull it out. The vehicle may not have all the fuses, relays, and features illustrated.

boxDescription: The rear compartment fuse box is located behind a cover on the left side of the rear compartment. To access the fuses, remove the cover. The vehicle may not have all the fuses, relays, and features illustrated.
